concept: Conceptualize a survival game where you're stranded in a microbiome that rapidly evolves in response to your actions. Every resource you harvest or predator you eliminate creates evolutionary pressure that transforms the environment in unexpected ways. Develop symbiotic relationships with certain organisms to gain advantages while avoiding creating ecological imbalances that spawn even more dangerous threats. Discover that this accelerated evolutionary playground was engineered as a biological computing system solving complex problems through natural selection.
